Title: Define proposal record schema
Description: Turn ingest candidates into explicit proposal records with stable IDs, provenance, and promotion intent.

Title: Implement propose command
Description: Compile ingest candidate reports into reviewable proposal bundles without mutating canonical files.

Title: Implement promote command
Description: Promote approved proposal records into canonical files with deterministic diffs and rollback-friendly output.

Title: Add eval gate for promotion
Description: Require deterministic eval checks before promotion writes back to canonical files.

Title: Add candidate/proposal diff tooling
Description: Create a human-readable diff between candidate bundles, proposal records, and canonical files.

Title: Harden Codex ingest classifier
Description: Improve Codex ingest classification and add stronger round-trip regression tests.

Title: Harden OpenClaw ingest boundaries
Description: Prove that workspace ingest never crosses into runtime-state sidecars or host-owned state.

Title: Harden Claude Code memory promotion policy
Description: Define how user-local Claude memory topics may or may not promote into shared canonical memory.

Title: Add signed snapshot packaging
Description: Package the capsule, proposals, and projection metadata into a signed snapshot format.

Title: Create conformance suite
Description: Add adapter conformance cases for ownership, lossiness, profile override behavior, and ingest determinism.

Title: Create benchmark suite
Description: Measure hydrate, ingest, and search cost for representative capsules.
